betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Assembly Machine§f

§aThe heart of your factory — automates production of complex items.§f

The §bAssembly Machine§f is a 3×3 pseudo-multiblock used to craft practically every advanced machine in the game. It needs power and a recipe template.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at a Tier 2 (steel) anvil from: steel ingots ×8, copper plates ×4, motors ×2, vacuum tubes ×4.
Can also be duplicated from another assembly machine — cheaper.

§6Operation§f:
§b• Select a recipe§f via the blue folder button in the GUI
§b• Provide power§f (HE) from a generator
§b• Insert materials§f matching the recipe preview

§6Blueprints§f:
Some recipes (plates, Gerald, Soyuz, radiation engine) require a blueprint in the blueprint slot. Blueprint booklets are found in structures — right-click to consume and get a random blueprint.

§eTip§f: Power it with a wood-burning generator or stirling engine early on.
